channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bodily Fluids requiring cleansing clean up the stool outside 128 Brooke Road and the branches debris on the pavement., 31st March
item.description:
Bodily Fluids requiring cleansing clean up the stool outside 128 Brooke Road and the branches debris on the pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all over ground, 31st March
item.description:
Litter over floor next to bin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eynsham Drive, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Twi mattress , various bits of furniture, 31st March
item.description:
Fly tipping in the pavement. Mattress had fallen over holding pavement for wheelchair access

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Been on pavement, 31st March
item.description:
Abandoned bin outside of my house obstructing the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lumley Close, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo and branches on street outside 128b Brooke road, 31st March
item.description:
128b Brooke rd n16 7rs Please can you remove dog poo next to the tree and also sweep and clean up the branches, generally the pavement needs sweeping urgently. I have abrojken leg and and afraid I will fall due to your not cleaning g this pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various items left by 98 Ewart Road, 31st March
item.description:
Various items left by 98 Ewart Road SE231BE

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Malham Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged to vehicle from grass cutting contractor, 31st March
item.description:
At or around 09:30am Westfield Road, DA7 6LR rear window to my vehicle was smashed as a result of debris from a grass cutting machine. Photos attached from the video footage showing the full incident which can be supplied shows the ride on mower being used at an angle hanging over the kerb to navigate around a tree.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westfield Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, builders vans obstructing driveways, 31st March
item.description:
Builders vans randomly parked across the pavement and not parked in marked bays, causing obstructions, dangerous and perilous driving conditions for residents trying to manoeuvre their cars onto the street from their home
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Osidge Lane, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge potholes not sorted, 31st March
item.description:
Lots of large potholes along this section of Petts Wood Road. They are getting bigger each month yet no repair work has been undertaken. Apart from causing damage to cars, they could be lethal to cyclists travelling along this road yet nothing is being done about it. Someone could be seriously injured or killed. Instead of resurfacing Chislehurst Road which had very few potholes someone should have prioritised Petts Wood Road. It is an absolute disgrace.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 31st March
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Brighton Terrace, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sleeping bag, ironing board dumped, 31st March
item.description:
Forecourts of 2 lock up garages with sleeping bag, ironing board etc. Reported it earlier. Had an email an hour ago saying issue had been fixed. It hasn’t. All items are still there.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): De Laune Street, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown ivy from the Beckenham Library grounds, 31st March
item.description:
Recently, an attempt was made to cut back the ivy from Beckenham Library which is impacting the dental practice at 18 Beckenham Road. However, the area is still restricted, and the overgrown ivy and bushes is encouraging vermin activity. Please can additional steps be taken to cut back the ivy to mitigate vermin issues and facilitate access to the AC units to enable servicing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Eastern Way Slip Road (coming from Plumsted), 31st March
item.description:
Huge pothole on slip way which caused damage to my alloy wheel. Photos available but unable to upload as form complete by third party (London Borough of Bexley) on my behalf.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Byron Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 31st March
item.description:
I reported this blocked roadside drain and was happy to hear that it had been cleared. But I’ve just had a look and quite frankly I can’t see much of a difference!! I understand that cars parked close by the drain make it difficult but the impacted mud and debris still needs to be cleared. Please do try again. Thanks.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenesk Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead gox, 31st March
item.description:
There is a dead fox on the corner of Craigholm and Shooters Hill.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Craigholm, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant rubbish no enforcement with sign posted, 31st March
item.description:
Can lewisham council look into this problem as people are constantly fly tipping and this has been reported several times after cleaning with enforcement signs but no action against fly tipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Comet Street, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping dumped copper pipes by 5 Cecilia Road., 31st March
item.description:
Fly Tipping dumped copper pipes by 5 Cecilia Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cecilia Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 31st March
item.description:
Addressed UniB IDH: 180 Bakhtaver Ali 9 Josephine Avenu Bration London SW2 2JU Ref: 1x 24pk 20cm Return: Business Acc NO FIREWORK التان RESSED A

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Appach Road, Brixton, Greater London

item.title: 13th Report this year, 31st March
item.description:
And Again - please do something

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Weir Road, Bexley, Greater London
